data.body: GAP_ANALYSIS AC_AMENDMENT: T2 AC must explicitly verify that the .tombstone.json path (not just event log) surfaces through _get_ticket_status. _status.py line 32 reads .tombstone.json and returns tombstone['status'] — this IS the path T1's test exercises. Add assertion in T2's test validation: after writing .tombstone.json with {status:deleted}, call _get_ticket_status directly and assert it returns 'deleted' before running the full graph assertion. This ensures the tombstone-aware status path is the one being tested.
